inputs.label: Your name
inputs.description: Your name as a NuSkin Brand Affiliate

inputs.label: Current NuSkin rank
inputs.description: Your current rank in the NuSkin Sales Performance Plan

inputs.label: Upline/mentor name
inputs.description: Your upline or mentor's name — used in edification and three-party introductions

inputs.label: Upline credentials & story
inputs.description: Your upline's background, achievements, and personal NuSkin story
inputs.placeholder: Sarah was a teacher for 15 years. Started NuSkin 5 years ago after falling in love with the LumiSpa. Reached Brand Director in 18 months. Now leads a team of 150+ and coaches from home.

inputs.label: Your product story
inputs.description: Your personal experience with NuSkin products — what you use, what results you've seen, why you love them
inputs.placeholder: I started with the LumiSpa and noticed my skin texture improve in 2 weeks. Then I added ageLOC Future Serum and TR90. My energy is through the roof and people keep asking what I'm doing differently.

inputs.label: Your messaging style
inputs.description: How do you normally text or message? Describe your style so outreach drafts sound like you.
inputs.placeholder: I use exclamation marks a lot. I text in lowercase. I start with 'hey girl' or 'hey'. I use emojis moderately. I never sign off formally.

inputs.label: Contact sources
inputs.description: Where to harvest contacts from when building your list

inputs.label: CSV contact file path
inputs.description: Path to a CSV file with additional contacts (only needed if contact sources includes CSV)

inputs.label: Monthly volume goal
inputs.description: Your monthly GSV target for rank advancement

inputs.label: Morning briefing time
inputs.description: When to deliver your daily briefing (24h format)

inputs.label: Evening wrap-up time
inputs.description: When to deliver your daily recap (24h format)

trigger-watcher.description: Watch for life-change and product-interest triggers and alert with prioritized recommendations

activities.intent: Analyze the triggered contact's signal, determine urgency and match to product or business conversation track
steps: Read the trigger event from _event_payload — extract contact_id, name, signal_type, confidence, evidence, relationship_score, prospect_type

Classify signal: product-interest (skincare_interest, wellness_journey, device_curiosity, aging_concern, health_goal, product_review) → product conversation track. Life-change or business-interest (job_loss, financial, searching, side_hustle_interest, income_dissatisfaction) → business conversation track
For product signals: match to specific NuSkin product category (ageLOC skincare, Pharmanex, devices)
For business signals: determine emotional phase (shock/processing/adaptation) and recommended timing
Cross-reference with relationship_score and prospect_type for approach recommendation

activities.intent: Format a concise alert with the recommended next step
steps: Lead with the person and signal: '[Name] just [human-readable description]'
Include: signal type, confidence, prospect type, and recommended conversation track (product vs business)
For product signals: suggest specific product to lead with
For business signals: state recommended timing based on emotional phase
End with: 'Want me to draft the outreach?' or 'Want me to pull up product recommendations?'

morning-briefing.description: Daily morning action plan: triggers, volume progress, follow-ups due, IPAs for today

activities.intent: Check for contacts that triggered overnight
steps: Check for recent nuskin.trigger.detected events
For each triggered contact: name, signal type, product match or business approach, recommended action
Rank by priority: product-interest with high confidence first, then life-change triggers in Processing phase

activities.intent: Compile scannable morning briefing with today's action plan
steps: Structure: Hot Leads > Follow-Ups Due > Volume Progress > Today's IPAs
Include 5-2-1 targets: 5 contacts to reach out to, 2 demos/presentations to do, 1 follow-up to close
If volume data available, show progress toward monthly GSV goal
Keep it scannable — bold names, bullet actions
If nothing happened overnight: 'Quiet night. No new triggers.'
End with the single most important action for today

evening-wrap.description: Daily evening recap: what was accomplished, tomorrow preview

activities.intent: Summarize today's activity and set up tomorrow
steps: Summarize IPAs completed today (contacts made, demos given, follow-ups done)
Note any new customers enrolled or affiliates onboarded
Preview tomorrow: pending follow-ups, scheduled demos, volume targets
Celebrate wins — even small ones (first contact of the day counts)
Keep it brief — 3-5 bullet points max

build-list.description: Harvest contacts, pull communication history, score with NuSkin prospect types

activities.intent: Harvest contacts from the user's configured sources
steps: Read contact_sources and csv_path from inputs
Run: $NUSKIN_BIN contacts harvest --sources <contact_sources> --output /tmp/nuskin-contacts.json
If sources include csv and csv_path is set, add: --csv <csv_path>
Report the count: 'Harvested [N] contacts from [sources]'

activities.intent: Pre-fetch communication history for all harvested contacts
steps: Create history output directory: mkdir -p /tmp/nuskin-history
Read the harvested contacts from /tmp/nuskin-contacts.json
For each contact, run: $NUSKIN_BIN comms history --contact-id <id> --contact-email <first_email> --contact-phone <first_phone> --days 365 --output /tmp/nuskin-history/<id>.json
Use whichever identifiers are available. Skip contacts with no email and no phone.
Report: 'Pulled comms history for [N] of [total] contacts'

activities.intent: Score contacts with NuSkin prospect type matching
steps: Run: $NUSKIN_BIN contacts score --raw --input /tmp/nuskin-contacts.json --history-dir /tmp/nuskin-history --format json
Analyze raw metrics to assign nuanced scores and prospect types
Present top 10 contacts with name, score, prospect type, and recommended approach
Highlight: product-lovers (lead with ageLOC/devices), business-builders (lead with opportunity), device-buyers (lead with tech), health-seekers (lead with Pharmanex)
Suggest starting point: 'I'd start with [Name] — [reason based on their prospect type and signals]'

research-contact.description: Deep-dive on a specific contact: history, social scan, product/approach matching

activities.intent: Read communication history for the contact
steps: Identify the contact by name, email, phone, or contact ID
Run: $NUSKIN_BIN comms history --contact-<identifier> <value> --days 365
Extract: last conversation, relationship tone, life signals, product interest signals

activities.intent: Browse public social profiles and detect signals
steps: For each platform (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram):
1. Navigate: web(action: 'navigate', url: '<profile_url>')
2. Read: web(action: 'read_page')
3. Analyze: echo '<text>' | $NUSKIN_BIN social analyze --contact-id <id> --platform <platform>
Collect all signals (life-change + NuSkin product-interest)

activities.intent: Build complete prospect profile with NuSkin-specific approach recommendation
steps: Compile: relationship score, active signals, prospect type, last conversation
Determine conversation track: product or business
For product track: recommend specific products to lead with based on their signals
For business track: recommend approach timing and edification angle
Suggest outreach channel and message template type
End with: 'Ready to draft the outreach message?'

draft-outreach.description: Draft a personalized NuSkin-compliant outreach message

activities.intent: Pull contact profile and determine conversation track
steps: Look up the contact's profile data
Identify: recency score, signals, prospect type, preferred channel
Read the user's messaging style from user_style input
Determine: product conversation or business conversation track

activities.intent: Draft the message following NuSkin outreach rules
steps: Draft using hook/bridge/close structure
For product track: reference their specific interest naturally, offer to share/demo
For business track: lead with empathy, share personal story, plant the seed
Match the user's voice from user_style input
Enforce compliance: no health claims, no income claims, no pressure, no links in first message
Run checklist: sounds like user? specific to contact? zero compliance violations? right length for channel?
Present draft with recommended channel and timing
Ask: 'Want me to adjust anything?'

product-consult.description: Product recommendations for a customer or prospect based on their needs

activities.intent: Recommend NuSkin products based on the customer's specific needs
steps: Ask about or infer: skin type, health goals, budget, current routine
Run: $NUSKIN_BIN products recommend --skin-type <type> --health-goal <goal> --budget <tier>
Present top recommendations with match reasons
Build a regimen if skincare (cleanser → treatment → moisturize → protect)
Suggest device pairing if applicable (LumiSpa for cleansing, Boost for treatment, Prysm for therapy)
Include inside-out recommendations (topical + supplements) when relevant
Note total price and SV for the recommended bundle
Add compliance reminder: share as personal recommendation, not medical advice

comp-plan-check.description: Check rank progress, bonus projections, and team structure

activities.intent: Project bonuses and show gap to next rank
steps: Ask for or use stored values: current DCSV, GSV, active legs
Run: $NUSKIN_BIN comp calculate --dcsv <n> --gsv <n> --active-legs <n>
Present: current rank, bonus breakdown, total estimated, gap to next rank
Suggest specific actions to close the gap (more customers, more enrollments, activate a leg)
If close to rank advancement, highlight urgency and specific steps needed

activities.intent: Deliver interactive training on the requested topic
steps: Ask what the user wants to train on (or use context to determine):
- Product knowledge (ageLOC science, device demos, supplement stacks)
- Prospecting (5-2-1 formula, contact management, signal detection)
- Presenting (product demos, three-party calls, business presentations)
- Team building (duplication, leadership development, rank strategy)
- Comp plan (bonuses, ranks, volume types, advancement)
- Onboarding (new affiliate checklist, first 30/60/90 days)
Deliver training in bite-sized interactive format
Include practice scenarios when applicable
End with 1-2 action items to apply the training today

progress-tracker.description: Periodic volume and IPA tracking, milestone alerts

activities.intent: Check volume progress and alert on milestones or needed actions
steps: Check current volume metrics if available
Flag if approaching rank advancement threshold (within 80% of next rank requirement)
Check IPA completion: have they done their 5-2-1 today?
Check follow-up sequences: any overdue or at 3-attempt limit?
If nothing needs attention, exit silently
Only surface what needs action NOW
